pantheon.description: Gather 3-5 expert perspectives in parallel and synthesize a single recommendation
pantheon.template:
Run a Pantheon synthesis on this question. Identify the 3-5 most relevant specialist perspectives, dispatch them in parallel with the same question, then synthesize a single authoritative recommendation.

Question: {{input}}

focus.description: Pin a session goal — all todos, delegation, and verification stay aligned with it
focus.template:
SESSION GOAL (pinned): {{input}}

All subsequent tasks, todos, and delegations must stay aligned with this goal. Verify alignment before each major decision. If a task drifts from this goal, flag it and ask for clarification before proceeding.

subtask.description: Run a bounded child worker and return a structured summary
subtask.template:
Run this as a bounded subtask and return a structured summary when complete.

Task: {{input}}

Return format:
- Status: DONE | BLOCKED | PARTIAL
- Summary: 2-3 sentence result
- Files changed: list
- Next action: recommendation

sketch.description: Turn a rough idea into a structured spec through Q&A

mirrordeps.description: Mirror a dependency's source into .deps/ for local inspection
mirrordeps.template:
Mirror the source of this dependency into .deps/ (gitignored) for local inspection.

Dependency: {{input}}

Steps:
1. Identify the GitHub repo for the dependency
2. Run: mkdir -p .deps && git clone --depth=1 <repo-url> .deps/<pkg-name>
3. Confirm .deps/ is in .gitignore
4. Report the cloned path and key files to inspect

audit.description: Ask Themis to audit current changes for quality, coverage and security
audit.template:
Audit the current changes for quality and security.

Focus: {{input}}

Steps:
1. Run `git diff HEAD` (or `git diff --staged`) to get the change surface
2. Identify changed files and classify review scope level (Plan/Wave/Task/Final)
3. Run ruff on changed Python files; Biome on changed JS/TS files
4. Check test coverage on changed code (target >80%)
5. Run OWASP Top 10 security checks
6. Apply self-reflection quality gate (6 categories, 1-10)

Return: APPROVED / NEEDS_REVISION / FAILED with specific file:line feedback and the scoring table.

ping.description: Ping all 17 Pantheon agents — dispatches to each and reports status
ping.template:
Ping all configured Pantheon agents. For each one, dispatch a task asking them to reply with their name and status. Collect all responses and present a table with: agent_name | role | status (✅ Online / ❌ No response).

If any agent fails to respond within 10 seconds, mark it as ❌ No response and continue.

praxis.description: Execute plan via task system - creates tasks from Athena plans, dependency ordering, mandatory gates
praxis.template:
Execute the plan using the task system.

Plan: {{input}}

1. Create tasks from the plan with dependency ordering
2. Execute each wave sequentially (parallel within wave, sequential between waves)
3. Stop at mandatory gates: Plan approval -> Phase review -> Git commit
4. Route: Zeus -> Hermes/Aphrodite/Demeter -> Themis -> Mnemosyne
5. Return status summary when complete.

metamorphosis.description: Intelligent refactoring - LSP analysis, Metis gap analysis, TDD refactoring, Themis verification
metamorphosis.template:
Run intelligent refactoring with safety guarantees.

Target: {{input}}

Steps:
1. Apollo: LSP analysis of target
2. Athena + Metis: gap analysis and plan
3. Hermes: TDD refactoring (RED->GREEN->REFACTOR)
4. Themis: verification (tests must pass before AND after)

Safety: No behavior changes. Tests must pass before AND after.

cancel-relentless.description: Cancel relentless mode - stops the self-referential development loop, preserves work
cancel-relentless.template:
Cancel relentless mode immediately.

Stop the self-referential development loop. Preserve all work in progress. Do NOT discard changes, close session, or delete tasks. Return control to the user.

stop-continuation.description: Stop all auto-continuation - stops relentless mode, auto-continue, and task system continuation
stop-continuation.template:
Stop ALL auto-continuation mechanisms immediately.

Stop: relentless mode, auto-continue, task system auto-continuation.
Preserve: manual tools, agent delegation, hooks, safety gates.

Return control to the user. Do NOT close session or discard work.
